response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases, aligning with core requirements, but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) far exceeds the entry-level position, raising concerns about fit, cost, and potential misalignment with team structure; additionally, his German language skills are basic despite high on-site presence in Berlin being required.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from API to UI with scalable architecture focus
Active open-source contributions and deep understanding of devops/tooling
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role with 10+ years of senior experience
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
Career trajectory suggests expectation of leadership, not individual contributor role
